app.name: Ambient
app.tagline: A quiet place to return to.

notificationsPermission.title: Get notified when it matters?
notificationsPermission.body: By default, Ambient stays silent. We only knock when AI genuinely senses something to say — at most once a day.
notificationsPermission.caption: You can turn this off anytime in Settings.

reasons.reason2: When someone may need a message
reasons.reason3: When the weekly digest is ready

privacy.title: What you write stays with you.
privacy.body: AI reads your journal to produce a summary signal. The group only sees that signal — never the original text.

write.description: Original journal — kept only for you.

reads.description: Creates a 1–2 sentence emotional summary, anonymizing all details.

senses.description: Only sees a warm signal — steady, curious, low.

choose.description: Can share a specific entry, or never.

neverSeen.description: Raw journal text, exact words, private mood logs, and free-text responses — never shared, never exposed.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account?
deleteAccount.body: Your journal, rhythm, and group connections will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.reason2: Your signal in every group you're in
deleteAccount.caption: You'll be signed out on every device.

compose.aiWillSummarize: AI will summarize after you save
compose.placeholder: Write a few lines for yourself. No one else can read this.

detail.aiSignalHeading: AI SIGNAL · WHAT THE GROUP SEES
detail.privacyNote: Only you see the original text

edit.title: Edit a few lines for yourself.
edit.aiHint: AI will re-summarize after you save.

group.aiSignalNote: AI signal · group only sees summaries, never what you write

create.title: Create a small, close group.
create.body: Ambient is for 3–8 trusted people. Invite by link — no public profiles, no search.
create.inviteLabel: YOUR INVITE LINK · EXPIRES IN 7 DAYS
create.inviteHint: Tap to copy. Share like any link — no public page.

join.title: Join a close group.
join.body: Invite links open here. Tap a link to see who's inviting you.
join.simulateHint: Simulates tapping a link a friend shared
join.emptySaved: No saved invites yet. They'll appear here when you tap "Later".

accept.title: Join the {{group}} pulse.
accept.body: No public profiles. Just you and {{count}} close friends.
accept.privacyBody: The group never reads what you write. AI only summarizes it into a warm signal — steady, curious, or low.

joined.title: Welcome to {{group}}.
joined.body: Start with a few lines for yourself — the group will gradually feel your rhythm.
joined.memberListBody: Four people, four distinct rhythms — connected through small signals.

empty.headline: A new circle, waiting for the first lines.
empty.body: When at least one person writes, AI starts weaving a signal for the group.
empty.cta: Write the first line for the group

insights.meetupBody: Everyone's a bit freer this week. Saturday afternoon could be the right time.
insights.supportBody: {{name}} seems quieter this week. You don't need to say much — a small message is enough warmth.

empty.eyebrow: NOTHING TO SAY — AND THAT'S OKAY
empty.headline: AI is listening. Silence is also an answer.
empty.body: We only speak when something matters. Better silence than meaningless noise.

leave.title: Leave group?
leave.body: Your rhythm will no longer appear in the group. Your personal entries stay here. You can return with a new invite link.

quietNotes.title: Small note
quietNotes.subtitle: AI only knocks when something truly matters.

quietNotesEmpty.title: Quiet notes
quietNotesEmpty.subtitle: At most once a day. Only when something matters.
quietNotesEmpty.headline: A quiet space.
quietNotesEmpty.body: When AI senses something worth saying, you'll see it here — not before.

meetupProposal.footer: If you propose, a tentative event joins everyone's calendar.

supportDetail.aiNoOneSees: NO ONE SEES THAT YOU MESSAGED
supportDetail.privacyNote: Ambient doesn't push you to message. And it won't tell {{name}} that AI suggested this.

garden.subtitle: {{done}} / {{total}} days · scroll to see the whole year

monthSubtitle.live: {{done}} days in · scroll to other months

notes.jan: Slow start, still finding your voice
notes.mar: Warming up, starting to leave home

welcome.title: Write for yourself.
welcome.body: A few lines a day, light as breath. No one reads it — not even your group.

signal.title: Close, from afar.
signal.body: Feel each other's emotions, without reading a word.

hints.title: Only when it matters.
hints.body: AI stays quiet by default. A gentle knock only when needed.

signIn.title: A few more lines are waiting.
signIn.body: Sign in to continue your journal pulse.
signIn.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.

email.title: Your email.
email.body: We'll send a sign-in code — no password needed.
email.label: YOUR EMAIL
email.footer: We don't store passwords. Code expires in 10 minutes.

otp.title: Check your email.
otp.label: VERIFICATION CODE
otp.spamHint: Didn't see the email? Check your spam folder.
